name: Ultimate Strawberry Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Grease a 9-inch springform pan; sprinkle with Graham Cracker crumbs, tilting the pan to coat the sides.
3. In a large bowl, mash cottage cheese through sieve. Add cream cheese and beat until well blended.
4. Beat in sugar, then add 2 eggs. Reduce speed to slow.
5. Beat in cornstarch, lemon juice, and vanilla; mix in margarine or butter and sour cream until smooth.
6. Pour mixture into prepared pan. Bake for 70 minutes or until firm around the edge.
7. Turn off oven. Let cake stand in oven for 2 hours. Remove from oven and chill.
8. Remove side of pan. If desired, cover with Strawberry Glaze. Freezes well.
STRAWBERRY GLAZE
1. Mix cornstarch, water, and light corn syrup until smooth.
2. Add strawberries; bring to a boil for 1 minute. Strain.
3. Stir in lemon juice and, if desired, a drop of red food coloring. Cool slightly, then cover top with glaze.
